Subjunctive Master Challenge

By Carlos & Denisse · Your Mexican Friend
Practice present subjunctive, imperfect subjunctive, perfect subjunctive, pluscuamperfecto del subjuntivo, indicative contrasts, and infinitive structures. Level B1-B2. No time limit.

40 B1-B2 questions Mixed triggers, tenses, and realistic Spanish sentences.
Clear correction Correct answers turn green and the app explicitly confirms when the student is right.
Review section Mistakes appear at the end with explanations in English.

Designed for Spanish learners who want serious B1-B2 subjunctive practice.
